element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls Kyle Reese throughout platforming and driving stages
Alternates with platforming sections; praised by reviewers as engaging segments
Includes police station and nightclub locations from film

typical_relief_triggers: Transition to driving levels (breaks platforming monotony)
typical_tension_triggers: Platforming sections with spread-out checkpoint placement
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Uneven pacing with difficulty spikes; checkpoints placed too far apart creates sustained tension rather than rhythmic cycles

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; introduces platforming mechanics with Kyle Reese as protagonist
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalates; checkpoint spacing criticized as too distant, creating difficulty spikes
difficulty_curve.late_game: Exceedingly difficult; reviewers noted poor checkpoint placement throughout
notable_spikes: Checkpoints placed too far apart (primary complaint across reviews)
Uneven difficulty balance criticized by multiple outlets

notable_level_patterns.description: Set in 2029 Skynet future; establishes threat context and protagonist motivation
Recreation of film locations including police station and nightclub; platforming-focused
Vehicle-based gameplay alternating with platforming; breaks monotony and praised by reviewers as engaging segments

sources_used: wikipedia - List of Terminator video games (Sega versions section)
data_quality_notes: T3 tier - extracted from Wikipedia game list entry. Source provides limited design documentation; based primarily on gameplay description (platforming + driving stages) and contemporary review citations. Specific level sequencing, tension mechanics timing, and spatial patterns not documented in source.
